title: Trump threatens to withdraw US troops from Italy and Spain as Europe rift widens
snippet: Trump extends troop withdrawal threat beyond Germany to Italy and Spain. European allies criticized Iran war conduct. Day after Germany 5,000 troop withdrawal confirmed. Widening transatlantic rift. NATO implications.
tag_reason: 이탈리아·스페인 주둔군 철수 위협은 독일 철수 확대판으로 5/1 신규
